Title: Molecular regulation of the key specialized metabolism pathways in medicinal plants

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes glandular trichome initiation and increases artemisinin content
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of glandular trichome formation, indirectly elevating artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Screened from glandular trichome transcriptome. 2. Overexpression increased GST numbers and artemisinin content. 3. Repression lines showed opposite phenotype.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: acts mainly through promoting trichome development rather than directly activating core artemisinin enzymes
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: useful for increasing trichome density to raise artemisinin yield

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes glandular trichome initiation and increases artemisinin content
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. JA-inducible positive regulator of GST initiation. 2. Overexpression increased GST density and artemisinin. 3. Interacts with other MYB regulators.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: key positive trichome-development regulator linked to artemisinin accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes GST initiation and indirectly increases artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AaHD1-interacting TF. 2. Positively regulates GST initiation. 3. Likely contributes indirectly to artemisinin accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive trichome regulator affecting storage/biosynthetic capacity for artemisinin

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: represses GST initiation and reduces artemisinin biosynthesis indirectly
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AaHD1-interacting MYB. 2. Negatively regulates GST initiation. 3. Opposes positive trichome regulators.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative developmental regulator limiting artemisinin accumulation potential

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes GST initiation and artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Directly regulates AaHD1. 2. Interacts with AaMIXTA1 to form a regulatory complex. 3. Promotes GST initiation and artemisinin accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: upstream coordinator of glandular trichome development driving artemisinin production

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: negatively regulates trichome development and artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Negative regulator of GST initiation. 2. Represses AaADS and AaMIXTA1. 3. Reduces artemisinin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: strong repressor connecting trichome development and core pathway expression

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: negatively regulates trichome initiation and artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Negative regulator of GST initiation. 2. Overexpression suppresses artemisinin-related development. 3. Functions with AaTLR1-like behavior.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative developmental regulator limiting artemisinin accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: AaJAZ1; AaJAZ2; AaJAZ3; AaJAZ4; AaDELLA1; AaDELLA2; AaDELLA3
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Core JA signaling regulator. 2. Activates CYP71AV1 and DBR2. 3. Positively controls artemisinin accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: core jasmonate-responsive activator of artemisinin pathway genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Trichome-specific TF. 2. Activates multiple core artemisinin pathway genes. 3. Synergizes with AaTCP14.
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: interacts with AaTCP14 to synergistically activate targets
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: direct activator of multiple core pathway steps

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Synergistic partner of AaORA. 2. Activates DBR2 and ALDH1. 3. Promotes artemisinin biosynthesis; negatively affected by AaJAZ8.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of late artemisinin pathway genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-responsive positive regulator. 2. Activates AaCYP71AV1 and AaADS. 3. Is phosphorylated by AaAPK1 and also regulates AabHLH113.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: ABA-responsive activator coordinating multiple artemisinin regulators and pathway genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA- and JA-inducible. 2. Directly targets AaDBR2 and AaALDH1. 3. Positively promotes artemisinin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: direct activator of late biosynthetic genes

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: positively regulates artemisinin biosynthesis under light
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Light-induced positive regulator. 2. Activates AaGSW1 and AaABI5. 3. Also activates AaWRKY9 linking light and JA responses.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: light-responsive activator integrating environmental control of artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis. 2. Activates CYP71AV1 and AaORA. 3. Acts downstream of AaMYC2/AaHY5/AabZIP1-related signaling.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: intermediate positive switch amplifying pathway activation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis. 2. Acts downstream of AaHY5. 3. Functional evidence from overexpression and dominant repression.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive ABA/light-linked regulator of artemisinin accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activated by AaHY5. 2. Positively regulates AaDBR2 and AaGSW1. 3. Contributes to light and JA-mediated artemisinin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: integrator of light and JA signaling for artemisinin pathway activation

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: modulates artemisinin biosynthesis positively by integrating light and JA signaling
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GSW1-interacting protein. 2. Integrates light and JA signaling. 3. Positively modulates artemisinin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: condition-dependent positive regulator integrating signal pathways

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SA-responsive positive regulator. 2. Promotes artemisinin biosynthesis via AaERF1. 3. Functions with SA pathway components.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: SA-responsive activator connecting defense signaling to artemisinin pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Phloem-specific R2R3-MYB. 2. Activates TS and TBT expression. 3. Involved in taxol biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive tissue-specific activator of core taxol pathway genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Screened using JRE element from TcTASY promoter. 2. Overexpression decreased TcTASY expression. 3. Reduced taxol content.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative JA-responsive regulator of taxadiene synthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-responsive activator screened from TcTASY promoter. 2. Positively regulates TASY. 3. Enhances taxol biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive JA-responsive activator of an early committed taxol step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-induced activator. 2. Directly regulates TASY and TcERF15. 3. Positively controls taxol biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: core JA-responsive activator in taxol transcriptional network

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible negative regulator. 2. One of several JAMYC repressors. 3. Limits taxol biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative JA-associated controller of taxol pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible negative regulator. 2. Represses taxol biosynthesis. 3. Part of JAMYC repressor set.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative JA-associated controller of taxol pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible negative regulator. 2. Represses taxol biosynthesis. 3. Part of JAMYC repressor set.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative JA-associated controller of taxol pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-responsive MYB TF. 2. Activates taxadiene-5α-hydroxylase. 3. Increases taxol in cell suspension cultures.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: ABA-responsive activator of downstream oxidation step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SA-induced positive regulator. 2. Activates TcDBAT and TcERF15. 3. Enhances taxol production.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive defense-responsive activator of taxol biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Identified from single-cell transcriptome. 2. Endodermal cell-specific. 3. Activates T5OH and improves taxol biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: cell-type-specific activator of taxol pathway oxidation step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Xylem parenchyma cell-specific bHLH. 2. Targets TAT and T10OH. 3. Positively regulates taxol production.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: cell-specific positive regulator of mid-pathway taxol steps

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Identified from single-cell transcriptome. 2. Represses DBTNBT and DBAT. 3. Negative regulator of taxol biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative cell-specific regulator of late taxol biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Female-predominant regulator. 2. Forms MYB39-bHLH13 complex. 3. Activates GGPPS and T10OH for higher taxol content.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: sexually dimorphic positive activator of taxol accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Knockdown increased triptolide production. 2. RNAi upregulated TwHMGR1, TwDXR, TwMS and TwCPS. 3. Acts as negative regulator of triptolide biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: JA-related negative regulator limiting triptolide accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Knockdown increased triptolide production. 2. RNAi upregulated TwHMGR1, TwDXR, TwMS and TwCPS. 3. Acts as negative regulator of triptolide biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: JA-related negative regulator limiting triptolide accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-elicited positive regulator. 2. Regulates TwTPS27a and TwTPS27b. 3. Increases triptolide accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of dedicated triptolide synthase genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-responsive WRKY selected by homology. 2. Activates SmDXR. 3. Promotes tanshinone biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of precursor-supply step for tanshinones

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Upregulates SmCPS1. 2. Boosts tanshinone biosynthesis. 3. Functions as positive regulator.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of committed diterpene cyclization step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible AP2/ERF. 2. Directly regulates SmDXR. 3. Promotes tanshinone biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of precursor-supply pathway

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: negatively regulates tanshinone biosynthesis but positively regulates phenolic acid biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Negative regulator of tanshinone production. 2. Positive regulator of phenolic acid biosynthesis via SmRAS1. 3. Illustrates differential control of two major medicinal metabolite branches.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: condition- and pathway-dependent controller with opposite effects on two metabolite classes
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: dual role across distinct pathways in the same species

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. YE/Ag+-induced and root-hyperexpressed. 2. Regulates SmDXR1 and three clustered pathway genes. 3. Promotes tanshinone biosynthesis via GCC-box motifs.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: efficient activator of clustered tanshinone genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Promotes expression of SmCPS1 and SmKSL1. 2. Enhances tanshinone accumulation. 3. Positive AP2/ERF regulator.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of key diterpene skeleton genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of tanshinone biosynthesis. 2. Regulates clustered genes SmCPS1, SmKSL1 and SmCYP76AH1. 3. Enhances tanshinone content.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: activator of biosynthetic gene cluster components

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of tanshinone biosynthesis. 2. Activated by SmbZIP3. 3. Contributes to tanshinone accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive downstream MYB regulator in tanshinone network

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator validated by overexpression and CRISPR/Cas9. 2. Promotes tanshinone biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator supported by gain- and loss-of-function evidence

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: positively regulates both tanshinone and phenolic acid biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-inducible positive regulator. 2. Enhances tanshinone content by activating SmERF128 and SmMYB9b. 3. Also promotes phenolic acid production via SmTAT1.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: shared ABA-responsive positive hub for two medicinal metabolite pathways

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: negatively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Decreases tanshinone by downregulating SmbZIP3 and SmGGPPS. 2. Also negatively regulates phenolic acid biosynthesis. 3. Acts as a common repressor node across metabolite pathways.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: shared negative regulator across major S. miltiorrhiza specialized metabolites

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpression in hairy roots inhibited ginsenoside content. 2. Acts as negative regulator of ginsenoside biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative regulator limiting ginsenoside accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Induced by Chaetomium globosum. 2. Activates PgSE. 3. Overexpression significantly increases ginsenosides.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of early triterpenoid pathway step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible TF. 2. Binds MBSII element in PgDDS promoter. 3. May increase ginsenosides.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: probable positive regulator of dammarane skeleton formation
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: review states effect as likely/promotive rather than fully established

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Binds promoters of SE-4, CYP716A52v2-4 and β-AS-13. 2. Participates in ginsenoside Ro biosynthesis. 3. Also associated with root growth.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive coordinator linking ginsenoside Ro biosynthesis and root growth

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Binds promoters of biosynthetic genes for ginsenoside Ro. 2. Participates in ginsenoside Ro biosynthesis. 3. Also associated with root growth.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive coordinator linking ginsenoside Ro biosynthesis and root growth

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator in transgenic cell lines. 2. Increases expression of PnDS, PnSS, PnSE and PnFPS. 3. Promotes triterpenoid saponin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive upstream bHLH controller of multiple saponin pathway genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates PnSE and PnDS. 2. Promotes saponin biosynthesis. 3. Interacts with PnbHLH.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive MYB activator of key saponin pathway genes

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Repressor of saponin production. 2. Directly regulates PnSS, PnSE and PnDS. 3. Competes with PnMYB1 for interacting with PnbHLH.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: strong repressor shaping MYB-bHLH competition in saponin accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: suggested positive regulator of triterpene biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Ectopic expression in Arabidopsis induced triterpene-biosynthetic genes. 2. Role in P. quinquefolius ginsenoside biosynthesis requires further validation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: putative positive regulator not yet established in native system
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: evidence derived from heterologous system; native function not fully tested

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Light-responsive bZIP screened by co-expression. 2. Transient overexpression in leaves lowered CPT. 3. Acts as negative regulator of camptothecin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: light-responsive repressor of camptothecin accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Directly downregulates OpCPR. 2. Represses CPT biosynthesis in hairy roots.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative regulator of P450 electron transfer capacity within CPT pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of CPT biosynthesis. 2. Targets OpTDC. 3. Supported by overexpression and dominant repression.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of indole precursor branch

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of CPT biosynthesis. 2. Targets OpCPR. 3. Supported by overexpression and SRDX.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of oxidative branch support

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Represses several CPT-pathway genes. 2. Binds W-box elements. 3. Negative regulator validated by overexpression and CRISPR/Cas9.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: strong multi-target repressor of CPT biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Directly suppresses OpLAMT1 by binding NACRS. 2. Negative regulator of CPT biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative controller of iridoid branch methylation step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpression decreased CPT production. 2. Reduced OpTDC expression.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative regulator of precursor decarboxylation step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RNAi suppression lowered MEP and secologanin-strictosidine pathway gene expression. 2. Indicates positive role in CPT biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of upstream precursor and secologanin-strictosidine branches

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: regulates TIA pathway, especially bisindole alkaloid biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AP2/ERF clustered with SGD, ORCA3 and D4H. 2. Regulates MIA pathway especially bisindole alkaloids by activating TDC.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of entry step supporting bisindole alkaloid production

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: positively regulates TIA biosynthesis and increases multiple alkaloids
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Asα; TDC; G10H; LAMT; STR; T16H; D4H
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y1H screening; overexpression in hairy roots
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Screened using JERE element in STR promoter. 2. Upregulates many TIA genes. 3. Increases ajmalicine, serpentine and catharanthine.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: broad positive activator of TIA pathway

Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ASa; DXS; TDC; STR; CPR; D4H
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-induced regulator. 2. Increases precursor and pathway genes. 3. Leads to increased TIAs.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: major jasmonate-responsive activator of TIA production

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates CrORCA3 by binding JRE. 2. Co-expression with CrORCA3 synergistically promotes TDC and CPR. 3. In hairy roots, overexpression decreased TIAs due to competition with CrGBF1.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: condition-dependent controller with opposite outputs depending on system
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: contrasting effects in cells versus hairy roots due to promoter binding competition

Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional activation and repression of upstream activators
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates TDC via W-box. 2. Positively regulates serpentine biosynthesis. 3. Represses ORCA2, ORCA3 and CrMYC2.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: branch-shaping regulator with direct activation and indirect repression roles

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpression in cell line boosted multiple MIAs. 2. Transactivates MEP and iridoid genes. 3. Complementary to ORCA3.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of precursor branch supplying MIA biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Homolog of BIS1. 2. Positively modulates MIA biosynthesis in suspension cells.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of MIA pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Light-induced GATA TF. 2. Binds GATC motifs in D4H promoter. 3. Enhances vindoline accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: light-responsive positive regulator of vindoline branch

Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: TYDC; NCS; 6OMT; CNMT; CYP80B2; 4'OMT; BBE; CYP719A1
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpression enhanced multiple berberine pathway genes. 2. RNAi markedly reduced them. 3. Positive master regulator of berberine biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: broad positive regulator of nearly the entire berberine pathway

Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: 6OMT; TYDC; NCS; CNMT; CYP80B2; 4'OMT; BBE; CYP719A1
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Screened using 6OMT as target. 2. RNAi reduced transcript levels of multiple berberine genes. 3. Positive regulator similar to CjWRKY1.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive multi-gene activator of berberine pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RNAi suppression reduced biosynthetic gene expression. 2. Sanguinarine accumulation decreased.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive bHLH regulator of sanguinarine biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RNAi suppression reduced biosynthetic gene expression. 2. Sanguinarine accumulation decreased.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive bHLH regulator of sanguinarine biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates hyoscyamine 6β-hydroxylase H6H1. 2. Promotes tropane alkaloid biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of terminal hydroxylation step leading to scopolamine branch

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Auxin-induced LBD TF. 2. Inhibits TA biosynthesis genes. 3. Promotes lateral and adventitious root initiation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative regulator linking root development and tropane alkaloid metabolism

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Core JA-signaling TF. 2. Activates SmTAT1, SmPAL1 and SmCYP98A14. 3. Promotes phenolic acid biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: central JA-responsive activator of phenolic acid pathway

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Inhibits SmTAT1 and SmPAL1. 2. Reduces phenolic acid production. 3. Antagonizes SmMYC2.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative antagonist of JA-responsive activation

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: no clear change in phenolic acid biosynthesis despite repression of SmTAT1
Regulation_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: SmBHLH53; SmbHLH37; SmJAZ1; SmJAZ3; SmJAZ8; SmMYC2
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Represses SmTAT1. 2. Overexpression caused no obvious change in phenolic acid biosynthesis. 3. Interacts with multiple bHLH/JAZ proteins.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: minor or context-dependent regulator rather than decisive controller
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: phenotypic effect on metabolite not clearly established

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible R2R3-MYB. 2. Upregulates SmCYP98A14. 3. Interacts with SmMYC2 to further activate target gene.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator cooperating with SmMYC2

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible positive regulator. 2. Upregulates SmCYP98A14.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive activator of key phenolic acid oxidation step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Interacts with SmJAZ8. 2. Promotes SmPAL1 and SmTAT1 expression. 3. Positively regulates phenolic acid biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator linking JA repression module to pathway activation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpression accumulated higher phenolic acids. 2. Direct targets include SmTAT1, Sm4CL9, SmC4H1 and SmHPPR1. 3. Inhibits root growth.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: strong positive activator with growth tradeoff

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Screened using SmTTG1 as bait. 2. Overexpression increased phenolic acids. 3. Silencing caused opposite phenotype.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive component of MYB-bHLH-WD40-like regulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-responsive. 2. Binds G-Box-like1 motif in SmC4H1 promoter. 3. Positive regulator of phenolic acid biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: ABA-responsive activator of phenylpropanoid branch

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Interacts with SmSnRK2.3 and SmSnRK2.6. 2. Positively regulates phenolic acid biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: ABA signaling mediator promoting phenolic acid accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Negative regulator in phenolic acid biosynthesis. 2. Represses SmPAL1.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: negative ABA-related bZIP regulator of entry step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Directly activates SmTAT1. 2. Promotes phenolic acid biosynthesis. 3. SmNPR4 attenuates its effect.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: SA-responsive positive regulator of tyrosine-derived branch

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes accumulation of baicalin and wogonoside
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-inducible S20 R2R3-MYB. 2. Activates SbCCL7-4, SbCHI-2 and SbF6H-1. 3. Promotes baicalin and wogonoside accumulation in hairy roots.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive JA-responsive regulator of root flavone biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Binds SbFNSII-2 promoter. 2. Overexpression enhanced RSF content. 3. RNAi decreased baicalin and wogonoside accumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: key positive regulator of root-specific flavone branch

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Light-induced positive baicalin regulator. 2. Promotes CHI expression.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: light-responsive activator of flavonoid core step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Light-induced positive baicalin regulator. 2. Promotes CHI expression.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: light-responsive activator of flavonoid core step

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Directly regulates SbCLL-7. 2. Accelerates baicalin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: positive regulator of flavone precursor activation

Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Directly targets SbF6H, UGT and SbWRKY75. 2. Increases baicalin content.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: upstream positive regulator coordinating multiple baicalin biosynthetic regulators
